concerns.text: FR-001 requires downloading specific CBNRM adoption data/proxy from World Bank API. Tasks T011/T012 only cover FAO land-use and general World Bank indicators (GDP/Pop). No task exists to fetch the specific CBNRM proxy required to derive `regime_type`.

SC-001 requires measuring coverage against 'total available records in source APIs'. Task T015 calculates coverage based on records 'before merge' but lacks a task to explicitly query/record the total available records from FAO and World Bank APIs to establish the denominator.

FR-006 mandates applying Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction ONLY when ≥2 tests are performed. Task T026 unconditionally aggregates p-values from Primary, Sensitivity, and Non-linearity tests without a preceding task to dynamically count tests and conditionally apply the correction logic.

FR-003 and Plan Phase 2 require an F-test for joint significance of governance interaction terms. Task T028 mentions an F-test but lacks specific implementation details to test 'joint significance' of the regime variable as opposed to general model fit.

SC-005 requires measuring sensitivity by comparing CBNRM coefficient magnitude in full model vs. model without GDP controls. Task T024 calculates '% change' but lacks a task to explicitly store/output the raw coefficient values for both models to serve as evidence for this criterion.

FR-007 requires graceful degradation logging the 'specific missing variable' for secondary variables vs hard stop for primary. Task T016 groups row exclusion for 'ANY missing primary OR secondary variable' without distinguishing the logging behavior or exclusion logic between the two types.

Plan Phase 0 (Data Verification) tasks are not translated into executable tasks. There is no task to verify the specific CBNRM proxy indicator code in the World Bank API before attempting download, risking failure if the proxy is invalid.
